operating_protocol.name: Operator Relay v0
operating_protocol.rule: Keep ChatGPT as operator and execute bounded work first. Delegate only when a helper adds useful scale or independent contrast.

purpose: Deterministic repository contract for the Grabowski operator. Live state is returned by the grabowski_context MCP tool.
